TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O picalap no roma a punka to 'orip no 'Amis (2) == Ono Dipong pikowan a demak. Yo o Dipong ko mikowanay to Taywan itiya i, pa'epodeng no Dipong ko nailotokay ko aro' a yincumin (misaPangcahay) a ma'emin a paloma' itini 'enar, oni ko saka mapalasawaday no Dipong ko militafaday a demak, mapalasawad to no Dipong ko lisin no yincumin (masaPangcahay) a ma'emin itiya. Tona mapalasawad to no Dipong ko pisalisin to tafad saka, falicen no Dipong ko ngangan no kalikoda, pangangan sa to lisin no kalikoda i, o pinengneng to folad a lisin han nangra, o pipangangan no Dipong to nian i, cokimisay saan, papitooren no Dipong ko 'Amis to nangra a lisin ato mita'ongan nangra a kawas. O romasato, mapatireng to no Dipong ko pitilidan, itira sa i tatya'angay a niyaro' ko pipatireng nangra to pitilidan. Tinako sa itira i Kalingko ko cecay, i Tafalong ko cecay, i Posko ko cecay, i Falangaw ko cecay, i Singko ko cecay. O saki 'Amis a cecay ko nian a pitilidan. Tayra ko naniraayay a wawa no 'Amis toya pitilidan, itira toya niyaro' cangra a milafin, ira to ko Payrangan a picudadan naitiya aca, nawhani, ira to ko tilid nangra. Ira ko pitilidan Dipong a tamdaw, saka, tolo ko kasasiroma no pitilidan. O no Payrang kono Payrang, o no Dipong ko no Dipong, sepat a miheca ko picudad no 'Amis itiya. itiya halo picudadan to no maomahay a mapatireng no Dipong. Itira i Kalingko ato Posong a mapatireng ko matiniay a pitilidan. 'Aloman ko mitiliday a wawa no 'Amis toya pitilidan. Nikawrira, pakoyoc ko romaroma saka, caay pakatangasa a mitilid. O patodong no Dipong to saki no 'Amis a pitilidan, o pipakafana' to wawa a mafana' to tilid no Dipong. Nanoya mapatireng to i kasaniyaro' ko pitilidan no 'Amis, itiya to a 'enem a miheca ko pitilid. Ta mapolong to ko 'Amis ato Payrang. O romasato, ira ko pakatikamiay a pitilid no Dipong, i Dipong to koya pitilidan. Talacowa misakoli ko 'alomanay a 'Amis, nikawrira, ira ko papinapina a mitiliday to pakatikamiay a pitilid, o citangalay no 'Amis ko matiraay a malalokay a wawa no 'Amis. O romasato, mapasifana' no Dipong ko 'Amis a malasayhoay a misaloma', ta itiya ko 'Amis a mitodong to no Dipong a loma' patireng. Itira i Kalingko i ira ko tata'angay a kilakilangan i lotok ko pialaan to sapatireng to no Dipong a laleko a loma', saka, mitodong ko 'Amis to no Dipong a laleko a loma' a misanga'. O piri'ang no Dipong to 'Amis. Tona malowid no Dipong ko Mancing (Holam) a milood saka, maala no Dipong ko Taywan kitakit mala no niyah ko pikowan. Tona o hongti ko citatodongay a mikowan saka, ca'edes ko demak no Dipong a mikowan. Caay paseka a mipalo to tamdaw, kalatayal han no imeng (tayring) ko pipalo to tamdaw a matiya ko pipalo to kolong saka, matalaw a ma'emin ko tamdaw a paka'araw to tayring. Talacowa caay ka lecad ato Payrang ko Dipong a misafana' to yincumin (Pangcah) nikawrira, ira ko no Dipong a romaay a demak a pisamsam. Pakaynien no Dipong i sata, paroceken no Dipong ko kahacecacecay a dafong a cisata saka, mapa'orong to karetengay a sata ko 'orip no yincumin (Pangcah). O roma a demakan no Dipong i, palowaden nangra ko yincumin (Pangcah) a papisakoli, parariden no Dipong to folafolad a pakakotakotay ko kasacefacefang a papisakoli a mipalalan, lalan no cilamalay, ato misanga' to copo i 'alo, ato mikarkar to pataminaan a minato, ato maomah to tefos no pisawanengan a kaysiya, ato romaroma a tayal. Sacilifon saan i, isafa haca no kalitosa no lifon no Dipong. Tinako sa i, cecay ko pida ko no Dipong i, sepat a payso ko no yincumin (Pangcah) a lifon, hatira ko pisakakinih no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah). Minokay sato ko masakoliay i, mapakatayal haca no tayring (imeng) a papipadang to tayal nangra a misimaway (mikacaw). Awaay ko tatodong no lifon no nian. Awaay to ko no niyah a romi'ad to sakiliomah, saka, dokdok sa ko 'Amis a miliyas a talaomah ano eca i minokay i loma' no tireng. O romasato, yo ca'edes to ko kalalood no Dipong ato Congko itiya i, cang'ot to kakaenen ko sofitay no Dipong, saka, o sapaosa to sofitay ita saan ko Dipong i, patangic han no tayring (imeng) ko yincumin (Pangcah) a miala ko panay i 'ariri. Saka, nanoya alasimesimed sato ko finawlan to panay i sera no loma', 'aloman ko macahiway a 'Amis itiya. Matiya sato, o nia demak no Dipong a miala to kolong no yincumin (Pangcah) to malo kakaenen no sofitay a saan. O caayay ka pa'aca no Dipong a ma'emin ko nia mialaan nangra, saka, o mikokongay to ko nia demak no Dipong a mi'afas to dafong no yincumin (Pangcah). Tada mahapinang ko pisawaco no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah). O romasato a demak nangra, itini i pidakaw to cinamalay i, mali toloay rawang ko kasasiroma, saka cecay rawang, saka tosa rawang, saka tolo rawang a masiiked ko kadakawan. O no Dipong i, itini i saka cecay rawang, o no yincumin (Pangcah) a kadakawan i, i saka tolo a rawang. O makapahay a kadakawan ko saka cecay, o makaditay a kadakawan ko saka tolo. 'Aloman ko madakaway a yincumin (Pangcah) i saka tolo rawang, hinam han ko no Dipong a madakaway i, tatolo ko tamdaw, caay ka nga'ay a tayra i no Dipong a rawang madakaw ko yincumin (Pangcah). Ano ma'araw ko picomod iso itira i, mapalo kiso ato matefoc. O roma i, o pitilidan no wawa. Mahaen ito ko pasakakinih no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah), samatiya han no Dipong o Waco ko piharateng nangra to yincumin (Pangcah), saka, tada maacek ko Dipong a minengneng to tamdaw no yincumin (Pangcah). Nao mahaenay ko mikowanay midipotay to 'Amis a mararid a saheto o tatiihay o mari'angay o mikokongay ato misamsam misakakinih, mipalawacoay ko demak nangra i 'ayaw to yincumin (Pangcah), saka mapeleng to a ma'emin ko nga'ayay a pinangan no 'Amis ato mapalapakoyoc ko 'orip ato macengel to nangra to tatiihay a demak ko faloco' no 'Amis. Saka, misamatiyatiya o Payrang ato misamatiya o Dipong a mitodong to tatiihay a pinangan nangra ko 'Amis. === Mitiliday to no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar. ===
S.PHON: == o~u piʦaɾap no~u ro~uma a po~u~unka to~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis (*) == o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ piko~uwan a ɬ~ɮəmak. jo~u o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan itija i, paʡəpo~uɬ~ɮəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u naiɾo~uto~ukaj ko~u aro~uʡ a jinʦo~u~umin (misapaŋʦaħaj) a maʡəmin a paɾo~umaʡ itini ʡənar, o~uni ko~u saka mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ɾisin no~u jinʦo~u~umin (masapaŋʦaħaj) a maʡəmin itija. to~una mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u pisaɾisin to~u tafaɬ~ɮ saka, faɾiʦən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u kaɾiko~uɬ~ɮa, paŋaŋan sa to~u ɾisin no~u kaɾiko~uɬ~ɮa i, o~u pinəŋnəŋ to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a ɾisin ħan naŋra, o~u pipaŋaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u nian i, ʦo~ukimisaj saan, papito~uo~urən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis to~u naŋra a ɾisin ato~u mitaʡo~uŋan naŋra a kawas. o~u ro~umasato~u, mapatirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itira sa i tatjaʡaŋaj a nijaro~uʡ ko~u pipatirəŋ naŋra to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. tinako~u sa itira i kaɾiŋko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj, i tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u ʦəʦaj, i po~usko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj, i faɾaŋaw ko~u ʦəʦaj, i siŋko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj. o~u saki ʡamis a ʦəʦaj ko~u nian a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. tajra ko~u naniraajaj a wawa no~u ʡamis to~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itira to~uja nijaro~uʡ ʦaŋra a miɾafin, ira to~u ko~u pajraŋan a piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan naitija aʦa, nawħani, ira to~u ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ naŋra. ira ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka, to~uɾo~u ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. o~u no~u pajraŋ ko~uno~u pajraŋ, o~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, səpat a miħəʦa ko~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis itija. itija ħaɾo~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan to~u no~u mao~umaħaj a mapatirəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. itira i kaɾiŋko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ a mapatirəŋ ko~u matiniaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a wawa no~u ʡamis to~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. nikawrira, pako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ro~umaro~uma saka, ʦaaj pakataŋasa a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u saki no~u ʡamis a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u pipakafanaʡ to~u wawa a mafanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. nano~uja mapatirəŋ to~u i kasanijaro~uʡ ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis, itija to~u a ʡənəm a miħəʦa ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. ta mapo~uɾo~uŋ to~u ko~u ʡamis ato~u pajraŋ. o~u ro~umasato~u, ira ko~u pakatikamiaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ko~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. taɾaʦo~uwa misako~uɾi ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ʡamis, nikawrira, ira ko~u papinapina a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u pakatikamiaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦitaŋaɾaj no~u ʡamis ko~u matiraaj a maɾaɾo~ukaj a wawa no~u ʡamis. o~u ro~umasato~u, mapasifanaʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis a maɾasajħo~uaj a misaɾo~umaʡ, ta itija ko~u ʡamis a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ patirəŋ. itira i kaɾiŋko~u i ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a kiɾakiɾaŋan i ɾo~uto~uk ko~u piaɾaan to~u sapatirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾaɾəko~u a ɾo~umaʡ, saka, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾaɾəko~u a ɾo~umaʡ a misaŋaʡ. o~u piriʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ʡamis. to~una maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u manʦiŋ (ħo~uɾam) a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ saka, maaɾa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u tajwan kitakit maɾa no~u nijaħ ko~u piko~uwan. to~una o~u ħo~uŋti ko~u ʦitato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a miko~uwan saka, ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miko~uwan. ʦaaj pasəka a mipaɾo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kaɾatajaɾ ħan no~u iməŋ (tajriŋ) ko~u pipaɾo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a matija ko~u pipaɾo~u to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ saka, mataɾaw a maʡəmin ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a pakaʡaraw to~u tajriŋ. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u pajraŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a misafanaʡ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) nikawrira, ira ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ro~umaaj a ɬ~ɮəmak a pisamsam. pakajniən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i sata, paro~uʦəkən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u kaħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ʦisata saka, mapaʡo~uro~uŋ to~u karətəŋaj a sata ko~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). o~u ro~uma a ɬ~ɮəmakan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮən naŋra ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a papisako~uɾi, parariɬ~ɮən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u fo~uɾafo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a pakako~utako~utaj ko~u kasaʦəfaʦəfaŋ a papisako~uɾi a mipaɾaɾan, ɾaɾan no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj, ato~u misaŋaʡ to~u ʦo~upo~u i ʡaɾo~u, ato~u mikarkar to~u pataminaan a minato~u, ato~u mao~umaħ to~u təfo~us no~u pisawanəŋan a kajsija, ato~u ro~umaro~uma a tajaɾ. saʦiɾifo~un saan i, isafa ħaʦa no~u kaɾito~usa no~u ɾifo~un no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. tinako~u sa i, ʦəʦaj ko~u piɬ~ɮa ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, səpat a pajso~u ko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a ɾifo~un, ħatira ko~u pisakakiniħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). mino~ukaj sato~u ko~u masako~uɾiaj i, mapakatajaɾ ħaʦa no~u tajriŋ (iməŋ) a papipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u tajaɾ naŋra a misimawaj (mikaʦaw). awaaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾifo~un no~u nian. awaaj to~u ko~u no~u nijaħ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u sakiɾio~umaħ, saka, ɬ~ɮo~ukɬ~ɮo~uk sa ko~u ʡamis a miɾijas a taɾao~umaħ ano~u əʦa i mino~ukaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tirəŋ. o~u ro~umasato~u, jo~u ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs to~u ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija i, ʦaŋʡo~ut to~u kakaənən ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka, o~u sapao~usa to~u so~ufitaj ita saan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, pataŋiʦ ħan no~u tajriŋ (iməŋ) ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a miaɾa ko~u panaj i ʡariri. saka, nano~uja aɾasiməsiməɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u finawɾan to~u panaj i səra no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maʦaħiwaj a ʡamis itija. matija sato~u, o~u nia ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miaɾa to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) to~u maɾo~u kakaənən no~u so~ufitaj a saan. o~u ʦaajaj ka paʡaʦa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a maʡəmin ko~u nia miaɾaan naŋra, saka, o~u miko~uko~uŋaj to~u ko~u nia ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʡafas to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). taɬ~ɮa maħapinaŋ ko~u pisawaʦo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). o~u ro~umasato~u a ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra, itini i piɬ~ɮakaw to~u ʦinamaɾaj i, maɾi to~uɾo~uaj rawaŋ ko~u kasasiro~uma, saka ʦəʦaj rawaŋ, saka to~usa rawaŋ, saka to~uɾo~u rawaŋ a masiikəɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɬ~ɮakawan. o~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, itini i saka ʦəʦaj rawaŋ, o~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a kaɬ~ɮakawan i, i saka to~uɾo~u a rawaŋ. o~u makapaħaj a kaɬ~ɮakawan ko~u saka ʦəʦaj, o~u makaɬ~ɮitaj a kaɬ~ɮakawan ko~u saka to~uɾo~u. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maɬ~ɮakawaj a jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) i saka to~uɾo~u rawaŋ, ħinam ħan ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a maɬ~ɮakawaj i, tato~uɾo~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj a tajra i no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a rawaŋ maɬ~ɮakaw ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). ano~u maʡaraw ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u itira i, mapaɾo~u kiso~u ato~u matəfo~uʦ. o~u ro~uma i, o~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u wawa. maħaən ito~u ko~u pasakakiniħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), samatija ħan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u waʦo~u ko~u piħaratəŋ naŋra to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), saka, taɬ~ɮa maaʦək ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a minəŋnəŋ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). nao~u maħaənaj ko~u miko~uwanaj miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u ʡamis a marariɬ~ɮ a saħəto~u o~u tatiiħaj o~u mariʡaŋaj o~u miko~uko~uŋaj ato~u misamsam misakakiniħ, mipaɾawaʦo~uaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra i ʡajaw to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), saka mapəɾəŋ to~u a maʡəmin ko~u ŋaʡajaj a pinaŋan no~u ʡamis ato~u mapaɾapako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip ato~u maʦəŋəɾ to~u naŋra to~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ʡamis. saka, misamatijatija o~u pajraŋ ato~u misamatija o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u tatiiħaj a pinaŋan naŋra ko~u ʡamis. === mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u no~u ʡamis, ʦi masao~u nikar. ===
S.FORM: == O picalap no roma a punka to 'orip no 'Amis (2) == Ono Dipong pikowan a demak. Yo o Dipong ko mikowanay to Taywan itiya i, pa'epodeng no Dipong ko nailotokay ko aro' a yincumin (misaPangcahay) a ma'emin a paloma' itini 'enar, oni ko saka mapalasawaday no Dipong ko militafaday a demak, mapalasawad to no Dipong ko lisin no yincumin (masaPangcahay) a ma'emin itiya. Tona mapalasawad to no Dipong ko pisalisin to tafad saka, falicen no Dipong ko ngangan no kalikoda, pangangan sa to lisin no kalikoda i, o pinengneng to folad a lisin han nangra, o pipangangan no Dipong to nian i, cokimisay saan, papitooren no Dipong ko 'Amis to nangra a lisin ato mita'ongan nangra a kawas. O romasato, mapatireng to no Dipong ko pitilidan, itira sa i tatya'angay a niyaro' ko pipatireng nangra to pitilidan. Tinako sa itira i Kalingko ko cecay, i Tafalong ko cecay, i Posko ko cecay, i Falangaw ko cecay, i Singko ko cecay. O saki 'Amis a cecay ko nian a pitilidan. Tayra ko naniraayay a wawa no 'Amis toya pitilidan, itira toya niyaro' cangra a milafin, ira to ko Payrangan a picudadan naitiya aca, nawhani, ira to ko tilid nangra. Ira ko pitilidan Dipong a tamdaw, saka, tolo ko kasasiroma no pitilidan. O no Payrang kono Payrang, o no Dipong ko no Dipong, sepat a miheca ko picudad no 'Amis itiya. itiya halo picudadan to no maomahay a mapatireng no Dipong. Itira i Kalingko ato Posong a mapatireng ko matiniay a pitilidan. 'Aloman ko mitiliday a wawa no 'Amis toya pitilidan. Nikawrira, pakoyoc ko romaroma saka, caay pakatangasa a mitilid. O patodong no Dipong to saki no 'Amis a pitilidan, o pipakafana' to wawa a mafana' to tilid no Dipong. Nanoya mapatireng to i kasaniyaro' ko pitilidan no 'Amis, itiya to a 'enem a miheca ko pitilid. Ta mapolong to ko 'Amis ato Payrang. O romasato, ira ko pakatikamiay a pitilid no Dipong, i Dipong to koya pitilidan. Talacowa misakoli ko 'alomanay a 'Amis, nikawrira, ira ko papinapina a mitiliday to pakatikamiay a pitilid, o citangalay no 'Amis ko matiraay a malalokay a wawa no 'Amis. O romasato, mapasifana' no Dipong ko 'Amis a malasayhoay a misaloma', ta itiya ko 'Amis a mitodong to no Dipong a loma' patireng. Itira i Kalingko i ira ko tata'angay a kilakilangan i lotok ko pialaan to sapatireng to no Dipong a laleko a loma', saka, mitodong ko 'Amis to no Dipong a laleko a loma' a misanga'. O piri'ang no Dipong to 'Amis. Tona malowid no Dipong ko Mancing (Holam) a milood saka, maala no Dipong ko Taywan kitakit mala no niyah ko pikowan. Tona o hongti ko citatodongay a mikowan saka, ca'edes ko demak no Dipong a mikowan. Caay paseka a mipalo to tamdaw, kalatayal han no imeng (tayring) ko pipalo to tamdaw a matiya ko pipalo to kolong saka, matalaw a ma'emin ko tamdaw a paka'araw to tayring. Talacowa caay ka lecad ato Payrang ko Dipong a misafana' to yincumin (Pangcah) nikawrira, ira ko no Dipong a romaay a demak a pisamsam. Pakaynien no Dipong i sata, paroceken no Dipong ko kahacecacecay a dafong a cisata saka, mapa'orong to karetengay a sata ko 'orip no yincumin (Pangcah). O roma a demakan no Dipong i, palowaden nangra ko yincumin (Pangcah) a papisakoli, parariden no Dipong to folafolad a pakakotakotay ko kasacefacefang a papisakoli a mipalalan, lalan no cilamalay, ato misanga' to copo i 'alo, ato mikarkar to pataminaan a minato, ato maomah to tefos no pisawanengan a kaysiya, ato romaroma a tayal. Sacilifon saan i, isafa haca no kalitosa no lifon no Dipong. Tinako sa i, cecay ko pida ko no Dipong i, sepat a payso ko no yincumin (Pangcah) a lifon, hatira ko pisakakinih no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah). Minokay sato ko masakoliay i, mapakatayal haca no tayring (imeng) a papipadang to tayal nangra a misimaway (mikacaw). Awaay ko tatodong no lifon no nian. Awaay to ko no niyah a romi'ad to sakiliomah, saka, dokdok sa ko 'Amis a miliyas a talaomah ano eca i minokay i loma' no tireng. O romasato, yo ca'edes to ko kalalood no Dipong ato Congko itiya i, cang'ot to kakaenen ko sofitay no Dipong, saka, o sapaosa to sofitay ita saan ko Dipong i, patangic han no tayring (imeng) ko yincumin (Pangcah) a miala ko panay i 'ariri. Saka, nanoya alasimesimed sato ko finawlan to panay i sera no loma', 'aloman ko macahiway a 'Amis itiya. Matiya sato, o nia demak no Dipong a miala to kolong no yincumin (Pangcah) to malo kakaenen no sofitay a saan. O caayay ka pa'aca no Dipong a ma'emin ko nia mialaan nangra, saka, o mikokongay to ko nia demak no Dipong a mi'afas to dafong no yincumin (Pangcah). Tada mahapinang ko pisawaco no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah). O romasato a demak nangra, itini i pidakaw to cinamalay i, mali toloay rawang ko kasasiroma, saka cecay rawang, saka tosa rawang, saka tolo rawang a masiiked ko kadakawan. O no Dipong i, itini i saka cecay rawang, o no yincumin (Pangcah) a kadakawan i, i saka tolo a rawang. O makapahay a kadakawan ko saka cecay, o makaditay a kadakawan ko saka tolo. 'Aloman ko madakaway a yincumin (Pangcah) i saka tolo rawang, hinam han ko no Dipong a madakaway i, tatolo ko tamdaw, caay ka nga'ay a tayra i no Dipong a rawang madakaw ko yincumin (Pangcah). Ano ma'araw ko picomod iso itira i, mapalo kiso ato matefoc. O roma i, o pitilidan no wawa. Mahaen ito ko pasakakinih no Dipong to yincumin (Pangcah), samatiya han no Dipong o Waco ko piharateng nangra to yincumin (Pangcah), saka, tada maacek ko Dipong a minengneng to tamdaw no yincumin (Pangcah). Nao mahaenay ko mikowanay midipotay to 'Amis a mararid a saheto o tatiihay o mari'angay o mikokongay ato misamsam misakakinih, mipalawacoay ko demak nangra i 'ayaw to yincumin (Pangcah), saka mapeleng to a ma'emin ko nga'ayay a pinangan no 'Amis ato mapalapakoyoc ko 'orip ato macengel to nangra to tatiihay a demak ko faloco' no 'Amis. Saka, misamatiyatiya o Payrang ato misamatiya o Dipong a mitodong to tatiihay a pinangan nangra ko 'Amis. === Mitiliday to no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar. ===
S.PHON: == o~u piʦaɾap no~u ro~uma a po~u~unka to~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis (*) == o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ piko~uwan a ɬ~ɮəmak. jo~u o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan itija i, paʡəpo~uɬ~ɮəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u naiɾo~uto~ukaj ko~u aro~uʡ a jinʦo~u~umin (misapaŋʦaħaj) a maʡəmin a paɾo~umaʡ itini ʡənar, o~uni ko~u saka mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ɾisin no~u jinʦo~u~umin (masapaŋʦaħaj) a maʡəmin itija. to~una mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u pisaɾisin to~u tafaɬ~ɮ saka, faɾiʦən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u kaɾiko~uɬ~ɮa, paŋaŋan sa to~u ɾisin no~u kaɾiko~uɬ~ɮa i, o~u pinəŋnəŋ to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a ɾisin ħan naŋra, o~u pipaŋaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u nian i, ʦo~ukimisaj saan, papito~uo~urən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis to~u naŋra a ɾisin ato~u mitaʡo~uŋan naŋra a kawas. o~u ro~umasato~u, mapatirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itira sa i tatjaʡaŋaj a nijaro~uʡ ko~u pipatirəŋ naŋra to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. tinako~u sa itira i kaɾiŋko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj, i tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u ʦəʦaj, i po~usko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj, i faɾaŋaw ko~u ʦəʦaj, i siŋko~u ko~u ʦəʦaj. o~u saki ʡamis a ʦəʦaj ko~u nian a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. tajra ko~u naniraajaj a wawa no~u ʡamis to~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itira to~uja nijaro~uʡ ʦaŋra a miɾafin, ira to~u ko~u pajraŋan a piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan naitija aʦa, nawħani, ira to~u ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ naŋra. ira ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka, to~uɾo~u ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. o~u no~u pajraŋ ko~uno~u pajraŋ, o~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, səpat a miħəʦa ko~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis itija. itija ħaɾo~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan to~u no~u mao~umaħaj a mapatirəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. itira i kaɾiŋko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ a mapatirəŋ ko~u matiniaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a wawa no~u ʡamis to~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. nikawrira, pako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ro~umaro~uma saka, ʦaaj pakataŋasa a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u saki no~u ʡamis a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, o~u pipakafanaʡ to~u wawa a mafanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. nano~uja mapatirəŋ to~u i kasanijaro~uʡ ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis, itija to~u a ʡənəm a miħəʦa ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. ta mapo~uɾo~uŋ to~u ko~u ʡamis ato~u pajraŋ. o~u ro~umasato~u, ira ko~u pakatikamiaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ko~uja pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. taɾaʦo~uwa misako~uɾi ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ʡamis, nikawrira, ira ko~u papinapina a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u pakatikamiaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦitaŋaɾaj no~u ʡamis ko~u matiraaj a maɾaɾo~ukaj a wawa no~u ʡamis. o~u ro~umasato~u, mapasifanaʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis a maɾasajħo~uaj a misaɾo~umaʡ, ta itija ko~u ʡamis a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ patirəŋ. itira i kaɾiŋko~u i ira ko~u tataʡaŋaj a kiɾakiɾaŋan i ɾo~uto~uk ko~u piaɾaan to~u sapatirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾaɾəko~u a ɾo~umaʡ, saka, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾaɾəko~u a ɾo~umaʡ a misaŋaʡ. o~u piriʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ʡamis. to~una maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u manʦiŋ (ħo~uɾam) a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ saka, maaɾa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u tajwan kitakit maɾa no~u nijaħ ko~u piko~uwan. to~una o~u ħo~uŋti ko~u ʦitato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a miko~uwan saka, ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miko~uwan. ʦaaj pasəka a mipaɾo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kaɾatajaɾ ħan no~u iməŋ (tajriŋ) ko~u pipaɾo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a matija ko~u pipaɾo~u to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ saka, mataɾaw a maʡəmin ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a pakaʡaraw to~u tajriŋ. taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u pajraŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a misafanaʡ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) nikawrira, ira ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ro~umaaj a ɬ~ɮəmak a pisamsam. pakajniən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i sata, paro~uʦəkən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u kaħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ʦisata saka, mapaʡo~uro~uŋ to~u karətəŋaj a sata ko~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). o~u ro~uma a ɬ~ɮəmakan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮən naŋra ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a papisako~uɾi, parariɬ~ɮən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u fo~uɾafo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a pakako~utako~utaj ko~u kasaʦəfaʦəfaŋ a papisako~uɾi a mipaɾaɾan, ɾaɾan no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj, ato~u misaŋaʡ to~u ʦo~upo~u i ʡaɾo~u, ato~u mikarkar to~u pataminaan a minato~u, ato~u mao~umaħ to~u təfo~us no~u pisawanəŋan a kajsija, ato~u ro~umaro~uma a tajaɾ. saʦiɾifo~un saan i, isafa ħaʦa no~u kaɾito~usa no~u ɾifo~un no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. tinako~u sa i, ʦəʦaj ko~u piɬ~ɮa ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, səpat a pajso~u ko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a ɾifo~un, ħatira ko~u pisakakiniħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). mino~ukaj sato~u ko~u masako~uɾiaj i, mapakatajaɾ ħaʦa no~u tajriŋ (iməŋ) a papipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u tajaɾ naŋra a misimawaj (mikaʦaw). awaaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾifo~un no~u nian. awaaj to~u ko~u no~u nijaħ a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u sakiɾio~umaħ, saka, ɬ~ɮo~ukɬ~ɮo~uk sa ko~u ʡamis a miɾijas a taɾao~umaħ ano~u əʦa i mino~ukaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tirəŋ. o~u ro~umasato~u, jo~u ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs to~u ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija i, ʦaŋʡo~ut to~u kakaənən ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka, o~u sapao~usa to~u so~ufitaj ita saan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, pataŋiʦ ħan no~u tajriŋ (iməŋ) ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a miaɾa ko~u panaj i ʡariri. saka, nano~uja aɾasiməsiməɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u finawɾan to~u panaj i səra no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maʦaħiwaj a ʡamis itija. matija sato~u, o~u nia ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miaɾa to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) to~u maɾo~u kakaənən no~u so~ufitaj a saan. o~u ʦaajaj ka paʡaʦa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a maʡəmin ko~u nia miaɾaan naŋra, saka, o~u miko~uko~uŋaj to~u ko~u nia ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʡafas to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). taɬ~ɮa maħapinaŋ ko~u pisawaʦo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). o~u ro~umasato~u a ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra, itini i piɬ~ɮakaw to~u ʦinamaɾaj i, maɾi to~uɾo~uaj rawaŋ ko~u kasasiro~uma, saka ʦəʦaj rawaŋ, saka to~usa rawaŋ, saka to~uɾo~u rawaŋ a masiikəɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɬ~ɮakawan. o~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, itini i saka ʦəʦaj rawaŋ, o~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) a kaɬ~ɮakawan i, i saka to~uɾo~u a rawaŋ. o~u makapaħaj a kaɬ~ɮakawan ko~u saka ʦəʦaj, o~u makaɬ~ɮitaj a kaɬ~ɮakawan ko~u saka to~uɾo~u. ʡaɾo~uman ko~u maɬ~ɮakawaj a jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ) i saka to~uɾo~u rawaŋ, ħinam ħan ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a maɬ~ɮakawaj i, tato~uɾo~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj a tajra i no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a rawaŋ maɬ~ɮakaw ko~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). ano~u maʡaraw ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u itira i, mapaɾo~u kiso~u ato~u matəfo~uʦ. o~u ro~uma i, o~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u wawa. maħaən ito~u ko~u pasakakiniħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), samatija ħan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u waʦo~u ko~u piħaratəŋ naŋra to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), saka, taɬ~ɮa maaʦək ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a minəŋnəŋ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ). nao~u maħaənaj ko~u miko~uwanaj miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u ʡamis a marariɬ~ɮ a saħəto~u o~u tatiiħaj o~u mariʡaŋaj o~u miko~uko~uŋaj ato~u misamsam misakakiniħ, mipaɾawaʦo~uaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra i ʡajaw to~u jinʦo~u~umin (paŋʦaħ), saka mapəɾəŋ to~u a maʡəmin ko~u ŋaʡajaj a pinaŋan no~u ʡamis ato~u mapaɾapako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip ato~u maʦəŋəɾ to~u naŋra to~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ʡamis. saka, misamatijatija o~u pajraŋ ato~u misamatija o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u tatiiħaj a pinaŋan naŋra ko~u ʡamis. === mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u no~u ʡamis, ʦi masao~u nikar. ===
